title: antirrhinum sempervirens subsp. pertegasii
intro: Antirrhinum sempervirens subsp. pertegasii, also known as the perennial snapdragon, is a flowering plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
